headline: Stryker’s chief accounting officer to retire
summary: William Berry Jr. will retire in September, with Corporate Controller Emily Baculik stepping into the role.

raw.headline: Stryker’s chief accounting officer to retire
raw.summary: William Berry Jr. will retire in September, with Corporate Controller Emily Baculik stepping into the role.

headline: Podcast: Supply chains, obesity drugs, and patents dominate Q1 earnings trends
summary: The healthcare team covers Q1 results from pharma and medtech companies and provides a wrap-up of the key takeaways.
